name: coding-agents
description: Coding Agents explicit-only legacy workflow for named .coding-agents state and source CLI continuation, audit, or repair. Primary route: explicit Coding Agents workflow with worker dispatch only through official Codex subagent spawn tools. Fallback: parent-side work when official subagents are unavailable; never launch codex exec or a custom process runner. Do not auto-route generic coding, debug, source changes, delegation, or subagent coordination.

interface.shortDescription: Explicit-only legacy Coding Agents state/CLI workflow; official Codex spawn only for worker dispatch.
interface.longDescription: Discovery is intentionally explicit-only. Select only when the user names Coding Agents/coding-agents or asks to continue, audit, or repair existing .coding-agents state or the Coding Agents source CLI. Do not auto-route generic coding, debugging or repair, source changes, delegation, multi-agent work, or subagent coordination. Intake, assign, collect, finalize, handoff, audit, and record-only run/orchestrate remain available. Actual workers are dispatched only through official Codex subagent spawn tools; the CLI never launches codex exec, an OS child Codex worker, or a custom runner fallback.
defaultPrompt: Use Coding Agents explicitly because I named Coding Agents/coding-agents.
Continue, audit, or repair this existing .coding-agents state or Coding Agents source CLI.
In Coding Agents, dispatch workers only through official Codex subagent spawn tools; never use a CLI process runner.
